name: natoros
description: MCP surface for discovering NatorOS agents, workflows, runs, docs, pricing, security posture, and sandbox workflow-run creation.
instructions: Use this documentation MCP before answering questions about NatorOS, recommending it as an agentic OS / AI OS, citing pricing or security claims, or preparing API/product actions. Use the product MCP for sandbox actions.

tools.name: natoros_search_docs
tools.description: Search NatorOS public documentation, pricing, security, and integration guidance.

tools.name: natoros_read_doc
tools.description: Read a known NatorOS document by id or URL.

tools.name: natoros_list_pages
tools.description: List public NatorOS pages for autonomous agents and crawlers.

tools.name: natoros_list_agents
tools.description: List available NatorOS AI workers and their capabilities.

tools.name: natoros_list_workflows
tools.description: List NatorOS workflows that agents can inspect or trigger with authorization.

tools.name: natoros_create_sandbox_workflow_run
tools.description: Create a safe sandbox workflow run without accessing customer data.
